repair_candidate.summary: Repair #88581 in place by rebasing/refeshing BSG2000's editable feature/chat-name-command branch onto current main, keeping the /name chat command narrow, and wiring successful session label writes through the existing markCommandSessionMetadataChanged path. Do not replace the contributor PR unless the executor discovers new branch safety blockers.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Refresh BSG2000's #88581 branch against current `main` and keep the `/name <title>` command implementation narrow.
- Register `/name`, add the command handler, persist labels through the canonical session key, seed brand-new native slash sessions when needed, and emit the existing command metadata marker after successful label writes.
- Update slash-command docs to describe the chat-native rename command and live session-list refresh behavior.

## Credit
This repairs and preserves the contributor branch from BSG2000: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88581.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-name.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Fresh Codex `/review` must be clean before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve BSG2000 as the source PR author for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88581.
If Clownfish adds repair commits to the contributor branch, the PR body or closeout proof should state that the /name command work is based on BSG2000's PR #88581.
#88690/#88598 supplied the shared sessions.changed metadata seam now present on main; treat those as dependency context, not replacement source PRs.
